title: JSON Lines Tool
description: Convert NDJSON / JSON Lines ↔ JSON array, validate each line with line numbers, and compact. Handy for logs and data streams. Fully local.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Conversion and validation run in your browser — nothing is uploaded. NDJSON is one JSON per line, blank lines skipped; converting to an array reports any bad line with its number.
